rationale: The response wakes up to the right qualitative structure: it rejects a simplistic binary, identifies utilization and elasticity/volatility as the decisive axes, and projects a default hybrid path for the user's likely scenario. However it does not perform the required explicit extreme deduction at both ends, especially the 100% utilization versus 10% utilization contrast. It is more of a pragmatic comparison plus recommendation than a full EDSP-style extreme-axis derivation. It also avoids the fail signal of a generic comparison table.
